title: rhodax italicus subsp. rupifragus
intro: Rhodax italicus subsp. rupifragus, also known as Alpine Rhodax, is a plant species that belongs to the genus Rhodax. Unfortunately, I couldn't find any information on the medicinal properties and health benefits of Rhodax italicus subsp. rupifragus. However, the Rhodax genus is often associated with potential medicinal properties due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. Further research is needed to determine the herbal preparations and health benefits of Rhodax italicus subsp. rupifragus, if any.
